items.name_en: M46595 M46596 Full Leather Messenger Bag Collection Small East West Métis Handbag The small East West Métis handbag features a trendy shoulder-bag silhouette. The compact body is made of soft Monogram Empreinte leather, featuring a distinctive S-lock and a stylish top handle, with a polished, shiny surface. Versatile and spacious. A detachable long shoulder strap makes it easy to carry on the shoulder or crossbody, a great companion for daily travel. Dimensions 21.5x6x13cm

items.name_en: M46740 New Monogram Double Star saumurbb, a mini version of the Double Star featuring a saddle bag silhouette. This charming Monogram mini bag is simply irresistible! items.name_en: M46961 Red - Creative Director Pharrell Williams reinterprets the Speedy Bandoulière 50 Monogram Leather bag with eye-catching, luxurious, and soft natural calfskin. He uses exquisite screen printing to embellish the Speedy with the Monogram pattern, recreating the twill texture of the Monogram canvas on the bag, creating a near-hand-painted blurred effect. 50 x 32 x 29 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_cn:
M47072 M47074
This Backup backpack is crafted from Monogram Empreinte calfskin leather, subtly featuring a Monogram embossed pattern. The detachable and adjustable shoulder strap allows for both single-shoulder and backpack carrying, while the top handle and braided chain offer options for hand-carry or crossbody.
20 x 22 x 14 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
